name.ja: <ruby>予幻使<rt>テオリアライズ</rt></ruby> メディウス

text.en:
(This card is always treated as a "Power Patron" card.)
If a "Power Patron" card is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can add 1 "Theorealize" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. If a monster(s) is banished face-up: You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Add 1 "Ars Magna" card from your Deck to your hand.
● Banish this card, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Diactorus" monster from your Extra Deck.
You can only use each effect of "Theorealize Medius" once per turn.
